pick_device.title: Select your Pixoo 64
pick_device.description: These devices were found on your network via Divoom's discovery service. Pick one, or enter an IP address manually.

manual.title: Connect to your Pixoo 64
manual.description: Enter the local IP address of your Divoom Pixoo 64. A test connection (Channel/GetAllConf) is made before the entry is created.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the device. Check the IP address and that it's on the same network.

init.title: Configure your Pixoo device
init.description: Update the device IP, the default page duration, and its pages. Pages are a raw YAML list of named entries. By default each page has a `components` list, but a page can instead set a `page_type` (clock, channel, visualizer, pv, fuel) for a native Pixoo screen or a prebuilt layout - see the README. The default duration applies to any page that doesn't set its own `duration`. Other optional per-page fields: `enabled` (Jinja template), `scan_interval` (seconds between refreshes while shown).

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the device. Check the IP address and that it's on the same network.
error.invalid_schema: Each page needs a `name` (text) field, and either a `components` (list) field or, for page_type clock/channel/visualizer, an `id` field.
